title: Studd Muffyn Silver Miami Curb Flat Chain 3MM
short_description: Minimal, classy, and made to stand out. The Silver Miami Curb Flat Chain 3MM is crafted from premium stainless steel with a polished silver finish that gives a clean everyday look without the worry of tarnishing.
body_html:
The Studd Muffyn Silver Miami Curb Flat Chain 3MM is designed for those who like their style subtle yet noticeable. Featuring a sleek Miami curb pattern with a refined 3MM thickness, this chain adds the perfect touch of shine to any outfit.

Made from high-quality stainless steel, it is built for everyday wear and offers a comfortable, lightweight feel. Whether worn alone for a clean look or layered with other chains, the Silver Miami Curb Flat Chain effortlessly complements both casual and formal outfits.

Its polished silver finish gives it a premium appearance while remaining low-maintenance and durable for daily use.

  • Premium Stainless Steel
  • Anti-Tarnish Finish
  • Sweat & Water Resistant
  • Everyday Wear Ready

Why you'll love it

  • Clean and versatile silver finish
  • Sleek 3MM Miami curb design
  • Comfortable for all-day wear
  • Lightweight yet durable construction
  • Pairs well with watches, bracelets, and layered chains
  • Suitable for both men and women
seo_title: Silver Miami Curb Flat Chain 3MM | Anti-Tarnish Steel
seo_description: Shop the Studd Muffyn Silver Miami Curb Flat Chain 3MM. Premium stainless steel, polished silver finish, anti-tarnish coating and everyday wear comfort.

metafields.highlights: Premium stainless steel · Polished silver finish · Sleek 3MM Miami curb pattern · Anti-tarnish · Sweat & water resistant · Lightweight everyday comfort · Unisex
metafields.material_or_ingredients: Premium stainless steel with a polished silver finish. Skin-friendly, nickel-safe build made for daily wear.
metafields.care_or_directions: Store in a dry place after use. Wipe gently with a soft cloth. Avoid direct contact with harsh chemicals or perfumes. Keep away from abrasive surfaces to maintain shine.
metafields.shipping: Ships in 24 hrs · COD available · Free shipping over ₹499

faqs.q: Will this chain tarnish or turn my skin green?
faqs.a: No. It is made from premium stainless steel with an anti-tarnish polished silver finish, so it keeps its shine and stays skin-friendly with daily wear.

faqs.q: Can I wear it in the shower or while sweating?
faqs.a: Yes. The chain is sweat and water resistant, so everyday splashes, workouts and rain won't damage the finish. Just wipe it dry afterwards.

faqs.q: Is this chain for men or women?
faqs.a: Both. The clean 3MM Miami curb design is unisex and works beautifully on men and women, worn solo or layered.
It has a refined 3MM thickness with a flat Miami curb pattern — substantial enough to stand out, yet light and comfortable for all-day wear.

faqs.q: Can I layer it with my other chains?
faqs.a: Absolutely. Its slim, flat profile makes it a perfect layering piece with watches, bracelets and other Studd Muffyn chains.

page_blocks.subtitle: Anti-Tarnish Finish | Sweat & Water Resistant | Everyday Comfort
page_blocks.product_brief: The Silver Miami Curb Flat Chain 3MM is minimal, classy and made to stand out. Crafted from premium stainless steel with a polished silver finish, it delivers clean everyday shine without the worry of tarnishing. Wear it solo for a subtle look or layer it up.
page_blocks.what_we_put_in:
✦ Premium Stainless Steel – strong, skin-friendly core built for daily wear
✦ Polished Silver Finish – clean, versatile shine that suits every outfit
✦ Anti-Tarnish Coating – keeps the silver bright without dulling over time
✦ Flat Miami Curb Links – sleek, flexible profile that sits flat and comfortable
page_blocks.product_benefits:
✨ Everyday Shine Without the Worry
The anti-tarnish finish keeps its polished silver look through daily wear.
✨ Sweat & Water Resistant
Wear it to the gym, in the rain or the shower without damaging the finish.
✨ Lightweight All-Day Comfort
The slim 3MM build feels barely-there yet looks substantial on the neck.
✨ Effortless Layering
A flat, low-profile chain that stacks cleanly with your other pieces.
✨ Truly Unisex
A clean Miami curb design that looks great on men and women alike.

page_blocks.product_specification:
Product Name: Studd Muffyn Silver Miami Curb Flat Chain 3MM
Design: Flat Miami Curb Chain
Material: Premium Stainless Steel
Finish: Polished Silver, Anti-Tarnish
Thickness: 3MM
Net Quantity: 1 Chain
Country of Origin: India
page_blocks.how_to_use:
1. Fasten the chain securely around the neck using the clasp.
2. Wear solo for a clean look or layer with other chains for depth.
3. Wipe gently with a soft cloth after wear and store in a dry place.
